global_description: A medium-sized nocturnal bird with a cryptic, mottled brown and gray plumage. It has a flat, wide head with a short bill and large, dark eyes. The body is elongated with long wings and a rounded tail, providing excellent camouflage against leaf litter.

part_details.head: Flat and wide with a short bill, large dark eyes, and mottled brown-gray feathers.
part_details.plumage: Cryptic pattern of brown and gray, providing camouflage.
part_details.wings: Long and narrow, mottled with brown and gray.
part_details.tail: Rounded, with a continuation of the mottled pattern.

spatial_relations: The wide head is positioned at the front of the elongated body.
The long wings extend from the sides of the body.
The rounded tail follows the end of the body.
